target_0.brief_supporting_logic: Catastrophic structural damage visible; turret and hull components are shattered and scattered; no intact major components remain; consistent with K-kill.

summary: One military equipment target has been assessed as DESTROYED with CONFIRMED confidence. The scene depicts a single tank with catastrophic structural damage, its turret and hull shattered and components scattered, lying in a field. The functional impact is complete loss of combat capability for the target.
